n
Mer. The native's father would have a
sister. He would have four brothers
Ven. Dh. and one sister. He would be of moder
ately fair complexion and of medium
Dt build. He would have an aquiline nose.
He would be fond of good food. He
Sat. would be proficient in his mother
tongue and a foreign language also. He
would be quick tempered but would easily cool down. He would have the line
of Lakshmi on his palm.
From the day of the native's birth to his 12th year, it would be a period
of plenty and comforts for his father. The native's father would become
famous and popular.
The next 10 years extending upto the native's 22nd year would be
prosperous. The native would progress well in his studies. He would become
very proficient in a foreign language. He would make friends with many.
In his 24th year, the native would marry a girl who was born under the
sign of Leo (SimhaLagna). The native's wife would bear him 4 sons and one
daughter.
